fields.summary: Specifies a color override for an individual entry in a font color palette.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontPaletteOverride` is a struct used to override the color of a specific entry
in a font's color palette (CPAL table). Set <xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride.Index>
to the palette entry index and <xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride.Color> to the
desired replacement color in ARGB format (`0xAARRGGBB`).

Pass a span of overrides via <xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments.PaletteOverrides> when
cloning a typeface with <xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.Clone(SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments)>.

This is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
var overrides = new SKFontPaletteOverride[]
{
    new SKFontPaletteOverride { Index = 0, Color = (uint)SKColors.Red },
};
var args = new SKFontArguments
{
    PaletteIndex = 0,
    PaletteOverrides = overrides,
};
using var typeface = SKTypeface.FromFile("myfont.ttf");
using var colorTypeface = typeface.Clone(args);
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the replacement color for the palette entry, in ARGB format.
fields.value: The color value in ARGB format (<c>0xAARRGGBB</c>).

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the instances are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
